info.title: Work Order Execution Work Order Segments API
info.description: Manage work order segments, actions, checklists, jobs, parts, images, and labor resources.

servers.description: Sandbox (Expert App API — work order microservice)

OAuth2.description: OAuth 2.0. Use the authorization code flow (three-legged) for interactive users, or the client credentials grant for machine-to-machine access. The `axiom` scope is required unless your product documentation states otherwise.

JsonPayload.description: JSON request or response body; shape depends on the operation.

post.summary: Add ad hoc segment to work order
post.description: Add an ad hoc job segment to a work order.

post.summary: Add segment by checklist or jobs
post.description: Add a segment from job IDs or checklist ID.

get.summary: List WO segments by service area
get.description: View segments for a work order grouped by service area.
View a segment related to a work order.

put.description: Update a segment related to a work order.

delete.description: Delete a segment related to a work order.

get.summary: Get WO segment by service area
get.description: View a segment with service-area grouping.

put.description: Send email notification of inspection summary details.
Send email notification for repair summary.

get.description: Return an action for the given business key.

post.description: Add an image to a checklist task.

delete.description: Remove an image from the checklist task.

post.description: Create a new task on a checklist.

get.description: Get a task on a checklist.

delete.description: Delete a task on a checklist.

patch.description: Update properties on a checklist task.

get.description: Get a part by ID on a work order checklist task.

put.description: Update a part on a checklist task.

delete.description: Delete a part on a checklist task.

patch.description: Patch a part on a checklist task.

get.description: Get all parts on the work order job.

put.summary: Put parts array (work order checklist task)
put.description: Replace parts using a part array.

post.description: Create a new part on the job.

get.summary: Get checklist on work order segment
get.description: View a checklist inside a segment for a work order.

post.description: Add a checklist using query `type=byId` and Expert Services checklist ID.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Use `byId` to reference Expert Services checklist.

get.summary: List jobs on work order segment
get.description: View all jobs inside a segment for a work order.

get.summary: Get job on work order segment
get.description: View a job inside a segment for a work order.

put.description: Update a job inside a segment for a work order.

put.description: Update a part by ID on a segment job.

get.description: Get all parts on the work order job.

put.description: Replace parts using a part array.

get.description: Get a labor resource for the given business key.

put.description: Create or update a labor resource by identifier.

get.description: View segments for a work order. Optional `groupby=serviceArea`.
